title: Metal borer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Metal borers''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of small, [[Parasite/Legends|parasitic]] [[Insect/Legends|insects]] that were often found at [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]] and [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]]. Generally regarded as a nuisance, they typically fed upon the [[Hull/Legends|hulls]] and exterior facades of [[Starship/Legends|starships]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
